stop_rule: Do not start assembly if any supplier identity, CAD revision, or sample record is missing.
notes: supplier drawing/STEP/sample identity checked before build start

stop_rule: Stop build on screen lift, adhesive under-compression, FPC overbend, touch failure, or no DSI bring-up log.
notes: adhesive compression, FPC bend radius, luminance, touch grid, and drop/lift checks pass

stop_rule: Stop build on connector mis-seat, flex continuity failure, battery-window clash, or missing routed-board clearance evidence.
notes: top/bottom board connector seating, flex strain relief, continuity, and battery window clearance pass

stop_rule: Stop build on camera decenter, dust, acoustic leak, blocked mesh, mic outlier, or missing capture/audio logs.
notes: camera alignment, dust/baffle inspection, speaker/mic/earpiece leak, and streaming/audio checks pass

stop_rule: Stop build on high USB insertion force, continuity failure, button force/travel outlier, haptic rub, or damaged gasket.
notes: USB insertion, post-cycle continuity, button force/travel/cycle, haptic clearance, and seal inspection pass

stop_rule: Stop build on battery interference, cable pinch, failed retention, stripped boss, or out-of-limit gap/flush.
notes: battery window fit, snap/screw retention, enclosure gaps, no cable pinch, and cosmetic check pass

stop_rule: Hold the unit on any functional, CMF, traceability, or final photo failure.
notes: display, touch, cameras, audio, USB, buttons, radio smoke, CMF visual, serial trace, and photo record pass
